_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: Ki67+ proliferating cells in neurofibroma tissue sections significantly decreased in Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre neurofibromas
details: Successfully detected proliferating cells in neurofibroma tissue sections, showing significant decrease in Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre neurofibromas
